summary: Full E2E testing of 'Other Brands' Vehicles page and Vehicle Profile Edit functionality. All features working correctly - Other Brands page shows CRUD operations with Make field, VehicleProfile shows Edit modal with conditional Make/Model fields based on brand.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/vehicles?brand=renault returns only Renault vehicles
Backend: GET /api/vehicles?brand=other returns only Other Brand vehicles
Backend: POST /api/vehicles with brand=other and make field creates vehicle successfully
Backend: POST /api/vehicles with brand=other without make field returns 400 error
Backend: POST /api/vehicles with brand=renault without model returns 400 error
Backend: PUT /api/vehicles/{id} updates make and model fields correctly
Backend: DELETE /api/vehicles/{id} removes vehicle
Backend: Search by make field works correctly
Frontend: Other Brands page loads at /vehicles/other-brands
Frontend: Other Brands page shows 'OTHER BRANDS' title with 'Manage non-Renault vehicles' subtitle
Frontend: Other Brands table has columns: REG NO, VIN, MAKE, MODEL, CUSTOMER, PHONE, ACTIONS
Frontend: Add Vehicle modal shows 'Make (Brand) *' as text input (not dropdown)
Frontend: Add Vehicle modal correctly creates Other Brand vehicle
Frontend: Vehicle Profile for Other Brands shows MAKE field
Frontend: Vehicle Profile for Other Brands has 4 tabs (no Dealer tab)
Frontend: Edit modal on Other Brands profile shows Make text input and Model text input
Frontend: Edit modal successfully updates Make and Model fields
Frontend: Renault Vehicles page filters by brand=renault
Frontend: Renault page has Model filter dropdown
Frontend: Renault page table shows ENGINE NO column (not MAKE)
Frontend: Renault Add Vehicle modal shows Model dropdown (not Make input)
Frontend: Renault Vehicle Profile has 5 tabs including DEALER tab
Frontend: Renault Edit modal shows Model dropdown (not Make input)
Frontend: Sidebar navigation between Renault and Other Brands works
Frontend: Delete vehicle shows confirmation and removes vehicle from list
Frontend: Toast notifications shown for add/update/delete operations
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_UI_001 Ford Mustang during UI testing, TEST_OB_* vehicles during backend testing (cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Other Brands vehicles feature fully implemented. Key differentiators: 1) Other Brands uses 'make' field instead of model dropdown, 2) Other Brands profile hides Dealer tab, 3) Edit modal shows Make text input for Other Brands vs Model dropdown for Renault. Test vehicle MH01XY1234 (Toyota Corolla) exists in Other Brands.

other_brands_page.description: Full CRUD operations working - Add, View, Edit, Delete all functional

other_brands_add_modal.description: Shows Make (Brand) text input instead of Model dropdown - correct for non-Renault

vehicle_profile_edit.description: Edit button opens modal with correct fields based on brand

vehicle_profile_tabs.description: Other Brands hides Dealer tab (4 tabs), Renault shows all 5 tabs

renault_vehicles_filter.description: Renault page correctly filters by brand=renault

sidebar_navigation.description: Vehicles menu expanded with Renault and Other Brands sub-items, navigation works
